# Hustle House

> Premium AI Automation & MVP Development by elite IIT Kharagpur engineers.

Hustle House is a high-performance engineering squad specializing in cinematic digital experiences, AI-driven workflow automations, and high-fidelity MVPs. We operate with a selective partnership model, delivering world-class software at the intersection of production-grade design and robust backend architecture.

## Capabilities
- **AI Automations**: Custom LLM workflows, automated lead machines, and voice agents.
- **MVP Development**: Rapid end-to-end engineering of scalable products (Fintech, Edtech, Agritech).
- **Cinematic Web Design**: Editorial, high-impact front-end experiences (Next.js, Vite, Tailwind).
- **Voice Systems**: Intelligent Vapi-powered voice AI for business operations.

## Featured Projects
- **Liquivest**: Automated liquidity management and predictive accounting for MSMEs.
- **IITian's School**: Premium LMS and coaching ecosystem.
- **Toyadhi**: High-performance agritech scaling platform.
- **AbroadFit**: Comprehensive undergrad study abroad guidance system.
- **Inknarc**: High-fidelity creative agency portfolio.

## Technical Experiments (POCs)
- **Greatest Luxury**: A 6-act narrative journey into high-ticket curation.
- **Ignite Global**: Cyber-architecture for rapid global technical deployment.
- **Alpha Series**: Blueprint-inspired autonomous mobility showcase.

## Contact
- **Founder**: Sayak Moulic ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sayak-moulic-seo-web-dev-ai-automations/))

- **Schedule Call**: https://cal.com/kgphustlehouse/seo

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Vite, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, AOS, GSAP.
- Backend: Custom Python/Node.js automations, LLM Integrations (OpenAI, Anthropic).
- Deployment: Vercel, AWS.
